Spells-Paladin — Female Human Paladin: 10
Strength: 14 (+2) Dexterity: 11 (+0) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 12 (+1) Wisdom: 15 (+2) Charisma: 10 (+0)
Background: Sage Alignment: Chaotic Good
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 1; Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 73531/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 210/420
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Ability Boosts: 5 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Paladin (Paladin Fighting Style); Paladin (Paladin Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Magic Initiate (Druid); Skilled Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Paladin Features: Abjure Foes; Armor Training (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Aura Of Courage; Aura Of Devotion; Aura Of Protection; Blessed Warrior; Channel Divinity; Divine Sense; Extra Attack; Faithful Steed; Lay On Hands; Oath Of Devotion Spells; Oath Of Devotion; Paladin Fighting Style; Paladin Subclass; Paladin's Smite; Sacred Weapon; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Athletics, Insight, Intimidation, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion); Spellcasting; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Sage Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Skill Proficiency (Arcana; History); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Paladin Fighting Style: 1 selection
Paladin Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Arcana; History; Intimidation; Performance; Persuasion; Religion; Sleight Of Hand; Stealth
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +0 Insight: (wis) +2 Performance: (cha) +4
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +4 Persuasion: (cha) +4
Arcana: (int) +5 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +2 Medicine: (wis) +2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +0 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) +4
History: (int) +5 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +2
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Skill Notes:
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Divine Sense: R60' Can use Channel Divinity to sense the location and type of celestials, fiends, undead, consecration, and desecration for 10 min
Combat
Hit Points: 49 Initiative: +0 Armor Class: 14
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Ring Mail Shield: None Weapons: Glaive (+6 1d10+2 S; Graze); Handaxe (+6 1d6+2 S R20/60; Vex); Longsword (+6 1d8+2 S [2h d10]; Sap); Unarmed (+6 1+2 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +10
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Abjure Foes: R60' Can use Channel Divinity to frighten 1 target (save DC 12 Wisdom negates), limiting it to one move or action each turn, for 1 min or until damaged
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Sacred Weapon: Can use Channel Divinity to give a weapon wielded by self +1 attack, normal or radiant damage, and a 20' bright light for 10 min
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +6; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +2; Intelligence: +3; Strength: +4; Wisdom: +8
Save Notes:
Aura Of Protection: +1 on all saves
Aura Of Courage: R10' Self and allies have immunity to frightened
Aura Of Devotion: R10' Self and allies have immunity to charmed
Aura Of Protection: R10' Gives allies +1 on all saves
Magic
Spell Slots: C0: 2; P1: 4; P2: 3; P3: 2 Attack: D: +6; P: +4; W: +5 Spell DC: D: 14; P: 12; W: 13
Spells:
Aid (P2 Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Aid (P2 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Aura Of Life (P4 Abju): 30' radius gives allies resistance to necrotic damage and immunity to maximum hit point reduction, and raises those with 0 hit points to 1 hit point, for concentration up to 10 min
Banishment (P4 Abju): R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Beacon Of Hope (P3 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): R30' Targets gain advantage on Wisdom and death saves and regain maximum hit points from healing for concentration up to 1 min
Bless (P1 Ench): R30' 3 targets gain +1d4 on attacks and saving throws for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Branding Smite (P2 Evoc): Next successful self weapon attack inflicts +2d6 HP radiant and lights the target for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Command (P1 Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Create Food And Water (P3 Conj): R30' Creates 45 lb of food that lasts for 24 hr and 30 gallons of water
Cure Wounds (P1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+0 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 HP]
Daylight (P3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Death Ward (P4 Abju): Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Detect Evil And Good (P1 Divi): R30' Reveals aberrations, celestials, elementals, feys, fiends, undead, and Hallow effects for concentration up to 10 min
Detect Magic (P1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (P1 Divi): R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Dispel Evil And Good (P5 Abju): Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead suffer disadvantage on attacks vs. self for concentration up to 1 min; a successful spell attack returns them to their home plane (save Charisma negates), and touch also ends their enchantment, fright, or possession on the creature touched
Dispel Magic (P3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dispel Magic (P3 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Divine Favor (P1 Tran): Self weapons inflict +1d4 HP radiant for concentration up to 1 min
Divine Smite (P1 Evoc): Cast as a bonus action after hitting a target, causes the attack inflict +2d8 HP radiant, or +3d8 HP radiant on a fiend or undead [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Divine Smite (P1 [Paladin's Smite] Evoc): Cast as a bonus action after hitting a target, causes the attack inflict +2d8 HP radiant, or +3d8 HP radiant on a fiend or undead [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Find Steed (P2 Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in steed form; it has Armor Class 12, 25 hit points, a 60' Speed, and' and can communicate telepathically with self up to 1 mile an Intelligence of at least 6, can understand at least 1 language, and can communicate telepathically with self for 1 mile [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1 and hit points by 10; level 4 also gives a 60' fly Speed]
Find Steed (P2 [Faithful Steed] Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in steed form; it has Armor Class 12, 25 hit points, a 60' Speed, and' and can communicate telepathically with self up to 1 mile an Intelligence of at least 6, can understand at least 1 language, and can communicate telepathically with self for 1 mile [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1 and hit points by 10; level 4 also gives a 60' fly Speed]
Geas (P5 Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Gentle Repose (P2 Necr): Touched corpse becomes immune to decay and animation for 10 days [R]
Greater Restoration (P5 Abju): Touched recovers from exhausted, charmed, petrified, cursed, or ability reduction or regains hit point maximum
Heroism (P1 Ench): Touched gains immunity to becoming frightened and +0 temporary hit points each rd for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Lesser Restoration (P2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blindness, deafness, paralysis, or poison
Locate Creature (P4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Object (P2 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Magic Circle (P3 Abju): R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead, for 1 hr [+Level extends the duration +1 hr]
Magic Weapon (P2 Tran): Gives touched weapon a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr [+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6]
Prayer Of Healing (P2 Evoc): R30' 5 targets gain the benefits of a short rest and regain 2d8 hit points [+Level restores +1d8 hit points]
Protection From Evil And Good (P1 Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charm, fright, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Evil And Good (P1 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charm, fright, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Poison (P2 Abju): Touched recovers from poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Purify Food And Drink (P1 Tran): R10' Removes poison and disease from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Raise Dead (P5 Necr): Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Remove Curse (P3 Abju): Frees a touched creature from all curses or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Revivify (P3 Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Searing Smite (P1 Evoc): Cast as a bonus action after a successful self weapon attack, inflicts +1d6 HP fire, plus 1d6 HP fire per rd (save Constitution ends) for 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP initial and subsequent]
Shield Of Faith (P1 Abju): R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Shield Of Faith (P1 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Abju): R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Shining Smite (P2 Tran): Cast as a bonus action after a successful self weapon attack, inflicts +2d6 HP radiant and causes the target to emit a 5' bright light, negating invisibility and giving its foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Spare The Dying (C0 Necr): R30' Target dying creature becomes stable
Thaumaturgy (C0 Tran): R30' Creates minor magic effects—a booming voice, modification of flames, harmless tremors, an illusory sound, movement of a door or window, or a change in eye appearance—for 1 min
Warding Bond (P2 Abju): Touched gains +1 Armor Class, +1 saves, and resistance to all damage while within 60' of self, and any damage to the target also affects self, for 1 hr
Zone Of Truth (P2 Ench): R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Zone Of Truth (P2 [Oath Of Devotion Spells] Ench): R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Magic Notes:
Blessed Warrior: Knows 2 Cleric cantrips; can replace 1 of them when gaining a Paladin level
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 2 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Faithful Steed: Can cast Find Steed once per long rest
Lay On Hands: Can use bonus actions to heal 50 hit points per long rest and can use 5 hit points' worth to remove a poisoned condition
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Paladin's Smite: Can cast Divine Smite once per long rest
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the paladin spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
